title: Status information lost when moving items between boards
excerpt:
Our Status Column information is lost when moving items between boards. 
Both the Boards have the exact same naming conventions etc. What causes this? Its a new issue, it didn’t happen previously.

posts.author: liz.eller (Liz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our Status Column information is lost when moving items between boards.
Both the Boards have the exact same naming conventions etc. What causes this? Its a new issue, it didn’t happen previously.

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Liz! To confirm, are these items being moved manually by a user or via an automation between boards?
